basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI – Senior Research Fellow – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Senior Research Fellow (SRF). Candidates with M.Sc, Bachelor’s degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ICAR IARI official website iari.res.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Biotechnology with 4/5 years bachelor’s degree. Those with 3 years bachelor’s degree must have UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or equivalent or Ph.D. in any of above disciplines

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
